ModMetaData.name: Savecraft
ModMetaData.author: joshsymonds
ModMetaData.description: Your AI is making things up about your colony. Savecraft fixes that. Savecraft connects your colony to Claude and ChatGPT. Colonists, mood, resources, research, defenses, rooms, factions, threats -- real data from your actual save, updated live. What it does On every save, Savecraft reads your colony state and sends it to your AI: • Every colonist: backstory, traits, skills, passions, mood with all modifiers, health, equipment • Resources: full stockpile inventory, food supply in nutrition-days, medicine by type • Research: current project with progress, completed techs, available projects • Mood and health reports: break risk, worst modifiers, injuries, diseases, immunity • Infrastructure: power grid, growing zones, room quality, defenses • World: faction relations, raid threat level, recent incidents, animals Your AI also gets reference modules that know RimWorld's actual formulas: • Surgery success calculator (skill, bed, medicine, lighting) • Crop optimizer (nutrition/day and silver/day per soil) • Combat calculator (ranged and melee DPS, accuracy at distance) • Material lookup (final stats at any quality) • Drug production economics and addiction risk • Raid point estimator from colony wealth • Gene builder with conflict detection • Research navigator with time estimates Setup 1. Enable this mod 2. Start a game. A link code appears automatically. 3. Enter the code at savecraft.gg 4. Add the Savecraft integration in Claude or ChatGPT 5. Ask about your colony Compatibility RimWorld 1.5 and 1.6, all DLCs. Safe to add or remove mid-save. One Harmony patch (GameDataSaveLoader.SaveGame), works alongside other mods. Modded content not yet parsed. Privacy Sends structured game state to Savecraft's server for your AI to read. No save files, no filesystem paths, no personal data. Open source. https://savecraft.gg https://github.com/joshsymonds/savecraft.gg https://discord.gg/YnC8stpEmF
